summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and each PR has either a live linked issue, proof/review blockers, draft maintainer ownership, or unresolved technical/product review needs.

actions.reason: Keep as related to the active channel-stop-timeout issue family; do not close or merge while behavior proof and review-bot blockers remain unresolved.
Keep as related to the live model-alias issue; proof is still missing, but the branch is not low-signal or independently closable.
Keep related to the command-queue starvation issue and overlapping priority work; maintainer review/update is needed before any merge or superseded decision.
Keep independent as a maintainer-owned draft experiment; no close or merge recommendation is safe in this plan-only inventory shard.
Keep independent as a distinct maintainer draft for a Windows gateway fallback edge case; no closure action is justified.
